items.problem: No test exercises the `panelReviewers` path when a source has findings but all have empty Reviewer strings
`consensusExempt` dead-code branch for `Verification.Verdict == VerdictConfirmed` is exercised only by a direct unit test, never through `Reconcile`
`consensusNoiseCluster` sets `Similarity` to 0 but no test asserts the field value
No test for `consensusSingleton` on a `ConfVerified` merged finding
`categorySecurity` constant is exported implicitly (lowercase) but `CategoryOutOfScope` is used directly in the same switch; inconsistency may confuse future readers
The sort-order test comment explains the reviewer-sharing fix but the test still uses `recAt()` which sets a fixed time — the comment doesn't mention that `recAt()` is irrelevant to the fix
